title: Marketplace Manager - Flipkart Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Flipkart Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group has an exciting opening for a Marketplace Manager at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
